page.title: Myu Smart Tour · Integrated Intelligent Travel Solution

hero.title: Myu Smart Tour · Integrated Intelligent Travel Solution
hero.sub: Five-layer architecture × Seven core technologies | A closed-loop AI tourism platform covering planning, departure, transportation, destination, and re-engagement.

intro.title: Five Layers · Full Coverage
intro.lead: Built on Core Engine, Infrastructure, Intelligent Services, Traveler Experience, and Data Insight, connecting the full journey from pre-trip to post-trip through AI, big data, cloud-edge computing, IoT sensing, multimodal interaction, and digital guides.

core.title: Core Engine:
core.desc: AI model & data engine driving intelligent recommendation and forecasting.

infra.title: Infrastructure:
infra.desc: Cloud-native + edge nodes (scenic hubs) for flexibility and low latency.

services.title: Intelligent Services:
services.desc: NLP, multimodal recognition, itinerary and language adaptation.

experience.title: Traveler Experience:
experience.desc: Digital guide, humanized interaction, immersive MR/AR.

data.title: Data Insight:
data.desc: Profiles, routes, transactions, and feedback for remarketing and compliance.

video.title: Experience Smart Tourism in One Glimpse
video.lead: From AI theme planning to traffic coordination, safety alerts, immersive site interactions, and post-trip incentives — a full smart travel loop.
video.badge: Covers the full chain (Platform / App / Bus / Digital Human / IoT / Monitoring / Device / Interaction).

functions.title: Platform & Terminals · In Sync
functions.lead: Planning → Distribution → Execution → Interaction → Insight → Re-engagement.

items.title: AI Planning & Analytics Center
items.desc: Theme planning, channel distribution, dashboards, and forecasting.

items.title: Consumer App & Mini Programs
items.desc: Registration, itineraries, tickets, reminders, and social sharing.

items.title: Tour Bus Control System
items.desc: Team grouping, stop coordination, health monitoring, emergency response.

items.title: IoT Wearables & Positioning
items.desc: Heart rate & SpO₂, GPS synergy, straying alert, and rally reminders.

items.title: Digital Guide & Multimodal
items.desc: Voice/gesture interaction, MR/AR narration, cross-language Q&A.

items.title: Smart Monitoring & Safety Alerts
items.desc: Crowd heatmap, weather, risk detection, and dispatch.

items.title: Tourism Data Asset Platform
items.desc: Profiles, transactions, feedback driving data-driven operations.

items.title: New Energy & Onboard Power
items.desc: Flexible PV energy supports MR glasses, routers, and multiple devices.

bus.title: Vehicle Collaboration & Energy Replenishment
bus.desc: Bus system × flexible PV and storage provide power for guide screens, MR headsets, seat charging, and onboard routers for reliability.

mr.title: MR/AR Immersive Guidance
mr.desc: Digital human + sandbox + multilingual navigation with geofencing and scene triggers for time rewind, structure view, and cultural narration.

items.title: Immersive Experience:
items.desc: MR/AR and digital guides bring history and culture to life.

items.title: AI Assistant:
items.desc: Navigation, translation, story explanation, and dining suggestions instantly.

items.title: Multilingual Access:
items.desc: Simultaneous multilingual speech and subtitles for seamless communication.

items.title: Safety Visualization:
items.desc: Crowd heatmap, alerts, weather integration, and vital sign visibility.

items.title: Personalized Journey:
items.desc: Profile-driven itinerary optimization and dynamic queuing.

items.title: Sustainable Operation:
items.desc: Flexible PV energy + data assets to enhance retention and profitability.

items.title: Homogenization
items.desc: Lack of differentiated content and immersion.
items.solve: Digital human + scripted MR/AR; AI theme planning and UGC.

items.title: Language Barrier
items.desc: High cost for multilingual service.
items.solve: Real-time translation and captions; multilingual Q&A automation.

items.title: Safety & Emergency
items.desc: Straying, lost travelers, extreme weather risks.
items.solve: IoT tracking, alerts, weather-crowd command, one-tap SOS.

items.title: Uneven Traffic
items.desc: Overcrowded hot spots lower experience.
items.solve: AI queue optimization, off-peak recommendations, edge inference.

items.title: Weak Re-engagement
items.desc: Post-trip operations disconnected.
items.solve: Data assets, precision marketing, loyalty points and packages.

items.title: Single Revenue Source
items.desc: Overreliance on tickets and guides.
items.solve: Ads, partnerships, digital merch, premium and corporate tours.
